name: @ccctl/web-ui
description: ccctl zero-build static UI: plain HTML + vanilla ES modules (EventSource + fetch), no framework, no bundler
author: Alexey Pelykh (https://github.com/alexey-pelykh)

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r src dist/
scripts.lint: echo "@ccctl/web-ui: static assets, linted at root" && exit 0
scripts.dev: echo "serve this directory statically, e.g. npx serve ."
